title: NASA’s Perseverance rover has captured a panoramic view of ancient Martian terrain, and the photograph may hold clues about Red Planet's hidden secrets
description: NASA’s Perseverance rover has captured a breathtaking 360-degree natural-color panorama of a region nicknamed “Crocodile Bridge” on the rim of Jezero Crater. The image, made from 980 photos, showcases some of the oldest rocks in the solar system and offers new insights into Mars’ ancient geological history.

title: African elephant genomes reveal ancient mixing — and modern pressures
description: A continent-wide genomic study of both savanna and forest elephants in Africa has found that African elephants once roamed widely, both species exchanging genes throughout their range. However, as humans decimated elephant populations for their ivory and fragmented their habitats with farms and urban development, the effects of these disturbances appeared in the genomic patterns [...]

title: Round-the-clock renewables: New report says clean energy now challenges fossil fuels on price
description: The cost of battery storage has dropped more than 90 per cent since 2010, bringing the cost of renewable energy down with it.
